allow: Bash(mysql -u root -ppassword -h 127.0.0.1 -e "SHOW GRANTS FOR 'root'@'localhost'; SHOW GRANTS FOR 'root'@'127.0.0.1';")
Bash(mysql -u root -ppassword -h 127.0.0.1 -e "SHOW PROCESSLIST; SHOW OPEN TABLES WHERE in_use > 0;")
Bash(mysql -u root -ppassword -h 127.0.0.1 -e "SELECT user, host, plugin FROM mysql.user WHERE user='root';")
Bash(mysql -u root -ppassword -S /tmp/mysql.sock rehab_rise -e "DESCRIBE availability_template; SELECT * FROM availability_template LIMIT 10;")
Bash(mysql -u root -ppassword -S /tmp/mysql.sock rehab_rise -e "SHOW INDEX FROM availability_template;")
